case_title: MAURICIO A. PEREZ VS. ALEYDA COLOMER

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE FROM MAURICIO REYES RETURNED. IT IS AN EX-PARTE COMMUNICATION AND CANNOT BE FILED WITH THE COURT OR REVIEWED BY A JUDICIAL OFFICER.
